lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: Quiet! I'm here observing the lizardmen shamans, try not to blow my cover.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't seem to be hiding very well.

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: As if you could do better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know how many lizardmen I've killed?

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: The Shayzien records say you've killed [#] lizardmen since they began tracking your kills. [#] were lizardman shamans.

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: Quiet! I'm here observing the lizardmen shamans, try not to blow my cover.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't seem to be hiding very well.

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: As if you could do better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Riiiight, anyways, can I attack these lizardmen shaman?

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: Absolutely not! Do you want to get me killed? Now get out of here and stop trying to blow my cover!

lines.speaker: Shayzien Infiltrator
lines.text: Well I don't like the idea of you risking my cover. You are trusted by the Shayzien people though, so I suppose you can. Just be careful.
